rows.rank_rationale: #1 over #2: brand-direct UK page buyable today, full non-slip top for wet feet, and height stays low for this band.
rows.buying_factor_memo: Five factors set order. First, low height for just past two sink reach — tall towers wait. Second, non-slip top and base for wet bathroom floors. Third, brand concentration — at most two IKEA and two BabyBjörn. Fourth, live UK buyability on brand/IKEA/Boots after Amazon bot-walls. Fifth, review depth where IKEA exposes counts; BabyBjörn uses specialist notes when widgets are absent.

category_how.stage_1_card_label: I want to do it myself
category_how.buying_factor_memo: Five factors set order. First, low height for just past two sink reach — tall towers wait. Second, non-slip top and base for wet bathroom floors. Third, brand concentration — at most two IKEA and two BabyBjörn. Fourth, live UK buyability on brand/IKEA/Boots after Amazon bot-walls. Fifth, review depth where IKEA exposes counts; BabyBjörn uses specialist notes when widgets are absent.
category_how.methodology: Bench of UK step stools on BabyBjörn, Boots and IKEA PDPs; captured age signals from live pages (many stools omit a fixed start age — used overlapping toddler reach ranges with supervision notes); ranked by low height for 25–27m, non-slip coverage, review depth and buyability; URL-verified primaries 2026-07-24. John Lewis primaries returned unknown/unbuyable in-agent so brand/Boots/IKEA preferred.
